name: New Policy Short Claim
description: Claim filed within 30 days of policy start

name: Round Number Amount
description: Estimated amount is exactly a round number (e.g., $5000, $10000)

name: Weekend Incident Without Witnesses
description: Incident occurred on weekend with no corroborating witnesses

name: No Police Report - Auto Collision
description: Auto collision claimed without police report

name: Repeat High-Value Claims
description: Claimant has filed 2+ large claims in past 12 months

name: Claimed Amount Exceeds Vehicle Value
description: Repair estimate significantly exceeds market value of vehicle

name: Single Document Claim
description: Complex claim supported by only one document

name: Injury Claim Added Later
description: Medical/injury claim added days after initial property claim
